languages.text:
Проходит сквозь врага в радиусе 4 и останавливается с противоположной стороны, производит атаку оружием ближнего боя.
Не провоцирует АоО, не идёт в счёт атак.

traits.locale_text:
Проходит сквозь врага в радиусе 4 и останавливается с противоположной стороны, производит атаку оружием ближнего боя.
Не провоцирует АоО, не идёт в счёт атак.

languages.text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Проходит сквозь врага в радиусе 4 и останавливается с противоположной стороны, производит атаку оружием ближнего боя.
Не провоцирует АоО, не идёт в счёт атак.

traits.locale_text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a melee attack.
This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity, and this attack does not count toward the attack limit per turn.

The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a melee attack.
This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity, and this attack does not count toward the attack limit per turn.

The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента бросается к противнику в радиусе 4 клеток, перемещается сквозь его позицию на клетку с противоположной стороны и совершает {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаку в ближнем бою{/g}.
Это перемещение не провоцирует {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}атак по возможности{/g}, а атака не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента бросается к противнику в радиусе 4 клеток, перемещается сквозь его позицию на клетку с противоположной стороны и совершает {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаку в ближнем бою{/g}.
Это перемещение не провоцирует {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}атак по возможности{/g}, а атака не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.

Обладатель аугмента бросается к противнику в радиусе 4 клеток, перемещается сквозь его позицию на клетку с противоположной стороны и совершает {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}атаку в ближнем бою{/g}.
Это перемещение не провоцирует {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}атак по возможности{/g}, а атака не входит в лимит {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атак на ход{/g}.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur s'élance vers un ennemi se trouvant dans un rayon de 4 cases et vient se poster sur la case située sur son côté opposé avant de porter une {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaque de mêlée{/g}.
Ce déplacement ne provoque pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g} et cette attaque n'est pas déduite du {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}nombre maximum d'attaques par tour{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur s'élance vers un ennemi se trouvant dans un rayon de 4 cases et vient se poster sur la case située sur son côté opposé avant de porter une {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaque de mêlée{/g}.
Ce déplacement ne provoque pas d'{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g} et cette attaque n'est pas déduite du {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}nombre maximum d'attaques par tour{/g}.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan bir düşmanı yarıp geçerek düşmanın karşı tarafındaki hücreye doğru atılır ve bu esnada {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırısı{/g} gerçekleştirir.
Bu hareket, {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}fırsat saldırılarını{/g} tetiklemez ve saldırı da {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}tur başına saldırı{/g} sınırından sayılmaz.
languages.original_text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı, 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan bir düşmanı yarıp geçerek düşmanın karşı tarafındaki hücreye doğru atılır ve bu esnada {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırısı{/g} gerçekleştirir.
Bu hareket, {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}fırsat saldırılarını{/g} tetiklemez ve saldırı da {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}tur başına saldırı{/g} sınırından sayılmaz.

languages.text:
使用者冲刺穿过4格内的一名敌人，到达其另一端的格子，并施展一次{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}。
此移动不触发{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}，且此攻击不计入{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}每回合的攻击上限{/g}。
languages.original_text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用者冲刺穿过4格内的一名敌人，到达其另一端的格子，并施展一次{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}。
此移动不触发{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}，且此攻击不计入{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}每回合的攻击上限{/g}。

languages.text:
El usuario acomete a un enemigo situado en un radio de 4 casillas y llega hasta la casilla del lado opuesto, donde efectúa un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataque cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}.
Este movimiento no provoca {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g}, y el ataque no cuenta de cara al {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}límite de ataques por turno{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
El usuario acomete a un enemigo situado en un radio de 4 casillas y llega hasta la casilla del lado opuesto, donde efectúa un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataque cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}.
Este movimiento no provoca {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g}, y el ataque no cuenta de cara al {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}límite de ataques por turno{/g}.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer sprintet durch einen Gegner in einem Radius von 4 Feldern auf das Feld hinter dem Gegner und macht einen {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriff{/g}.
Diese Bewegung provoziert keine {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Gelegenheitsangriffe{/g} und fließt nicht in das {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}Angriffslimit pro Zug{/g} ein.
languages.original_text:
The user dashes through an enemy within a 4-cell radius to the cell on the enemy's opposite side and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Der Nutzer sprintet durch einen Gegner in einem Radius von 4 Feldern auf das Feld hinter dem Gegner und macht einen {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriff{/g}.
Diese Bewegung provoziert keine {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Gelegenheitsangriffe{/g} und fließt nicht in das {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}Angriffslimit pro Zug{/g} ein.

languages.text:
使用者は半径4マス以内の敵を突き抜けてその敵の反対側のマスへ突進し、{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g}を行う。
この移動は{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}機会攻撃{/g}を誘発せず、この攻撃は{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}ターンあたりの攻撃回数制限{/g}にカウントされない。

This movement does not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}, and this attack does not count toward the {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack limit per turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用者は半径4マス以内の敵を突き抜けてその敵の反対側のマスへ突進し、{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g}を行う。
この移動は{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}機会攻撃{/g}を誘発せず、この攻撃は{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}ターンあたりの攻撃回数制限{/g}にカウントされない。
